title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the Employee Referral Program work and what is the bonus policy?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. When you refer a candidate who is successfully hired and completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a referral bonus of $1,000. To participate, please submit your referral through the Employee Referral Portal on the intranet, including the candidate's resume and a brief explanation of why you believe they are a good fit. The referral must be made before the candidate applies for the position to be eligible for the bonus. Bonuses are paid out in the next payroll cycle following the completion of the 90-day period. For any questions or further details, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
